extraction.one_line_summary: TEUNISSEN Mike won sprint after leadout duty when GROENEWEGEN Dylan crashed inside final 1.5km, beating SAGAN Peter in bike throw.
tactical_patterns: VAN AVERMAET Greg attacked inside chapel climb to secure KOM jersey via steepest climb tiebreaker before flat finish.
TEUNISSEN successfully switched from leadout to sprinting role with 1.5km remaining when designated finisher GROENEWEGEN crashed.
Jumbo-Visma roster depth allowed immediate recalibration to victory after losing lead sprinter late in technical finale.

rider_signals.TEUNISSEN Mike: positive: demonstrated dual-role capability and sprint power sufficient to beat tier-one sprinters when given late opportunity
rider_signals.GROENEWEGEN Dylan: negative: crashed inside final 1.5km while positioned for leadout delivery in controllable flat sprint scenario
rider_signals.SAGAN Peter: negative: faded in bike throw despite good position, suggests vulnerability when pure power sprinters launch first
rider_signals.VAN AVERMAET Greg: positive: timed Gettysburg Wall attack perfectly to isolate rivals on 13% gradient, securing KOM via tiebreaker intelligence
rider_signals.EWAN Caleb: neutral: third place without crash complications suggests standard positioning but insufficient acceleration against surprise winner
rider_signals.COLBRELLI Sonny: neutral: opened sprint early from left side, unable to sustain speed through final 50m against fresher finishers
